parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_phone: $json.phone, p_lead_id: $json.leadId || null, p_user_message: $json.userMessage || "", p_ai_response: ($json.aiResponse || "") + ($json.followUp ? String.fromCharCode(10,10) + $json.followUp : ""), p_tokens_used: $json.tokensUsed || 0, p_tags: JSON.stringify($json.tags || []), p_persona: $json.persona || "onboarder", p_detected_name: $json.detectedName || null, p_conversation_id: $json.conversationId || null, p_photo_urls: $json.photoUrls && $json.photoUrls.length > 0 ? $json.photoUrls : null, p_photo_captions: $json.photoCaptions && $json.photoCaptions.length > 0 ? $json.photoCaptions : null }) }}
